title: Azure OpenAI Added Realtime SIP, GPT-4o Diarization, And GPT-Image-1-Mini
summary: Azure OpenAI what's-new notes for October 2025 list Realtime API SIP support, GPT-4o transcribe diarization, and GPT-image-1-mini global deployment availability.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official Microsoft Learn page reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Review Azure OpenAI audio, realtime, and image-generation model options for routing, access, cost, and feature-fit changes.

detail.migration_notes: Realtime SIP support is tracked in this model-availability event as an adjacent API workflow change.

limitations: The source groups these updates under October 2025, so APW uses an approximate month-start event date.
